err_info: qemu-system-x86_64: -device intel_lpss_pci: intel_lpss_pci device type already registered
pre_code: /* Ensure we don't register the same PCI ID/type twice. */ if (object_class_by_name(TYPE_PCIBASE_DEVICE)) { Error *local_err = NULL;  error_setg(&local_err, "intel_lpss_pci device type already registered"); error_propagate(errp, local_err); return; }
modified_location: Remove the duplicate registration check for the intel_lpss_pci device type.
